symptoms.symptom_name: Focal tender lid-margin nodule with pointing pustule

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A focal tender lid-margin nodule with a pointing pustule is characteristic of a stye.
Focal (not diffuse) involvement argues against preseptal cellulitis.

symptoms.symptom_name: Painless eye movements, normal vision, no proptosis, no fever

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Painless full eye movements, normal vision and no proptosis argue strongly against orbital cellulitis.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Clinical diagnosis; culture only if refractory.
